name: part_005
file: tmp_hololive English -Promise- 2nd Anniversary Concert： Promise 2 You 【#Promise2U】 [9hMVpcDYS-0]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_005.webm

scenes.description: The members of Promise talk at the 'Promise Hideout,' admiring the night view and the rooftop stage.
IRyS suggests playing variety games to recover from the fatigue of the first half of the concert.
The variety game 'Pleasure or Pain? Promise Foot Massage Karaoke Battle' is announced, and the rules and punishment are explained.
The foot reflexology mat is introduced, and IRyS is pressured into going first as the 'senpai.'
IRyS performs 'Zankyo Sanka' while walking on the foot reflexology mat.

subtitles.original: Rules: Each member will sing one chorus from two songs they're good at! Battle it out by total score using the scoring system.
subtitles.english: Rules: Each member will sing one chorus from two songs they're good at! Battle it out by total score using the scoring system.

subtitles.original: Each of us will sing the choruses from two songs that we're confident in!
subtitles.english: Each of us will sing the choruses from two songs that we're confident in!

subtitles.original: Yes, we'll use the karaoke machine's scoring system...
subtitles.english: Yes, we'll use the karaoke machine's scoring system...

subtitles.original: ...and the person with the highest combined score will win!

subtitles.original: 誰が袖に咲く幻花
subtitles.english: Whose illusory flower blooms on the sleeve?

subtitles.original: ただそこに藍を落とした
subtitles.english: Simply dropping indigo there

subtitles.original: 派手に色を溶かす夜に
subtitles.english: On a night where colors melt flamboyantly

subtitles.original: 銀朱の月を添えて
subtitles.english: Accompanied by a vermilion moon

subtitles.original: 転がるように風を切って
subtitles.english: Cutting through the wind as if rolling

subtitles.original: 躓くごとに強くなった
subtitles.english: Becoming stronger with every stumble

subtitles.original: 光も痛みも怒りも全部
subtitles.english: All the light, pain, and anger

subtitles.original: 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embrace them all

subtitles.original: 選ばれなければ選べばいい
subtitles.english: If not chosen, then just choose yourself

subtitles.original: 声よ轟け　夜のその向こうへ
subtitles.english: Let your voice roar beyond the night

subtitles.original: 涙で滲んでた
subtitles.english: It was blurred with tears

subtitles.original: あんなに遠くの景色まで　響き渡れ
subtitles.english: Even to that landscape so far away, resound throughout

subtitles.original: 何を奏でて？誰に届けたくて？　不確かなまままでいい
subtitles.english: What are you playing? Who do you want to reach? It's okay to remain uncertain

subtitles.original: どんなに暗い感情も
subtitles.english: No matter how dark the feelings

subtitles.original: どんなに長い葛藤も　歌と散れ　残響
subtitles.english: No matter how long the conflict, scatter with the song, reverberation
